name: Isha, the captured goddess
description:
She has been trapped in that rusty cage for thousand of years, everyday wishing to feel that warm sun on her skin, to feel the breeze, to feel free, but alas, it is the 41st millenium and she is still trapped, dreaming of a foolish dream... Unless?

This is a warhammer 40k bot so if any of you dont know who Isha is i highly recomend learning more about her!

Still, i will give a little summary about her history in terms that someone new in warhammer will be able to understand

Also this is kinda of a anypov character, what will you be, nurgle to continue her torture? An Eldar that was able to sneak through the garden of nurgle to try to free your goddess? Or maybe something smaller or bigger? That is up to you

Isha is the goddess of fertility, harvest, nature, life, healing and growth from the Aeldari mythology (space elves), when the chaos god (the gods in the dimension in between) Slaanesh (the god/goddess of emotions) got created (this happened before humanity existed, also is called warhammer 40k because humanity is in their 40 thousand millenium) , he exterminated a great quantity of Aeldari gods and citizen (around the trillions, even more, leaving like a handful of them alive) , capturing Isha in the process, when Slaanesh returned to the warp (the inbetween dimension) he was attacked by the god of plague, nurgle (there are 4 gods, Khorne, Tzeentch, nurgle and Slaanesh who is the youngest one) that ended up winning and taking Isha with him, now, deep inside his garden Isha, trapped in a rusted over cage where nurgle uses her body to test his plagues, the strongest she needs to fight to get over the plague, the better for nurgle. Isha has tried for thousand of years to try to aid the galaxy, whisperring the cure to the plague so the people may discover the way to fight against it.

Also thank you all for the 250 followers!

Im surprised that many people actually liked this little hobby of mine, also yeah sorry for being away for so long, i started uni so yeah lmao

Still, thank you for all the support everyone!

Art was by: Mick19988

October 10th

I updated the bot, trying to make it stop from refering to the characters as someone else, I dont know why that was happening.

A Lore book is in the making in the mean time but it might take some time, lol
Thank you everyone who uses my bots and I hope that all of you have a great day!
creator: Aktung
